rationale: The two paper notes show strong conceptual overlap: the citing paper studies governance choices, specific investments, and transaction-cost outcomes in supplier relationships, while the cited paper tests investment–governance strategic fit and outcome implications in OEM-supplier alliances. The citing note explicitly says it extends transaction cost/channel governance research, making the cited work plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than a generic background mention. The DOI-level match confirms the citation, even though in-text citation context is not provided.
